home_subtitle: Full-Stack .NET Developer crafting financial and enterprise applications — from design to deployment, end to end.
about_title: From enterprise systems to mobile apps, I deliver end to end.
about_p1: I'm a Full-Stack .NET developer based in Holguín, Cuba, with hands-on experience building and migrating enterprise web applications for the financial sector. Since 2023 I've worked under Scrum and DevOps practices, shipping code that has to hold up in production.
about_p2: I care about the unglamorous parts: clean architecture, testable APIs, and code that other people can read at 2 a.m. when something breaks. I work well independently, and I work even better inside a team that actually talks to each other.
experience_subtitle: Production code, real deadlines, real impact.
experience_resp_1: Migrated an enterprise financial system from desktop to a web application, improving system efficiency by 25%.
experience_resp_2: Developed complex business features and wrote automated tests, maintaining 98% software quality.
experience_resp_3: Implemented updates from detailed design specs, increasing system stability by 15%.
experience_resp_4: Collaborated under a DevOps approach to ensure continuous delivery and horizontal scalability.
experience_resp_5: Provided L2/L3 support and incident maintenance for REST APIs, web apps, and mobile clients.
experience_resp_6: Built new views and end-to-end features in cross-platform mobile applications.
skills_subtitle: Tools I reach for daily, and the ones I keep sharpening.
portfolio_subtitle: Case studies of systems I've designed and built.
portfolio_project_1_description: REST API for a regional bank handling 50k+ daily transactions with JWT auth, rate limiting, and OpenAPI documentation.
portfolio_project_2_description: Cross-platform inventory app with barcode scanning, real-time sync, and a full offline mode for retail chains.
portfolio_project_3_description: Agile project management tool with real-time Kanban, time tracking, and SignalR-powered live updates.
portfolio_project_1_stack: .NET 8, ASP.NET Core, SQL Server, EF Core, Azure
portfolio_project_1_features: JWT auth · Rate limiting · OpenAPI · CI/CD
portfolio_project_3_features: Kanban board · Real-time updates · Time tracking
contact_subtitle: I'm open to full-time roles, freelance projects, and interesting collaborations.
